steps.name: ai-parse-api
steps.summary: Created POST /api/parse route handler at app/api/parse/route.ts. Accepts { text: string } (max 500 chars), calls Claude claude-haiku-4-5, hand-validates the JSON response (non-empty title required; dueDate dropped if not YYYY-MM-DD; priority coerced to low|medium|high with medium fallback; tags filtered to string[]). Returns { title, dueDate?, priority, tags }. Error responses: 400 for bad input, 401/429 forwarded from the AI call, 502 for network/malformed-JSON errors. AC tests in app/api/parse/route.test.ts mock @anthropic-ai/sdk via vi.hoisted + vi.mock — 13 tests, all pass without ANTHROPIC_API_KEY. Model used: claude-haiku-4-5.

steps.name: quick-add-ai
steps.summary: Added NL parse input to QuickAdd modal: user types free text and clicks Parse (or presses Enter), which POSTs to /api/parse and pre-fills title/dueDate/priority/tags in the existing manual form for confirmation before add. Loading state shown in Parse button text. On any fetch/API error, a non-alarming notice appears and the manual fields remain fully usable (graceful fallback). Fetch is mocked in 3 new RTL tests (success pre-fills and adds; error falls back to manual; loading state renders). All 170 tests pass, lint clean, build succeeds.
